name: Nikhil Chopra
title: Software Engineer
summary: Software engineer with 8.9 years of experience across web, backend, and cloud systems. Strong fundamentals in software development and system design. Most of my work is conventional backend engineering — APIs, databases, queues, deployments. I've been keeping up with AI/ML at a self-learner level — taken some online courses, played with the OpenAI and Anthropic APIs, built a small RAG side project — but I haven't done it in a professional capacity yet. Open to roles where I can either deepen my software engineering work or, if the team is open to it, start contributing to ML-adjacent systems.

explainability.why_selected: 8.9 years experience in Software Engineer with FastAPI. Strong recruiter responsiveness (23%), minor concern: 30-day notice.
explainability.recruiter_notes: Candidate has 8.9 years of experience and 7 skills. Notice period: 30 days. Expected salary: 7.1 LPA. Priority level: Medium.
